parameters.query: SELECT s.*, p.name AS patient_name, p.phone, p.doctor_name, p.clinic_name FROM public.medicine_reminder_schedule s JOIN public.patients p ON p.id = s.patient_id WHERE s.scheduled_date = CURRENT_DATE AND s.status = 'pending' AND COALESCE(p.is_demo, FALSE) = FALSE
=UPDATE public.medicine_reminder_schedule SET status = 'sent', sent_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = '{{ $('Prepare Medicine Sends').item.json._schedule_id }}'
